---
title: "Instrumentos de levantamiento"
suppress-bibliography: true
---


@techreport{ELSOC,
  title = {{Cuestionario\_ELSOC\_2022\_M2}},
  year = 2022,
  month = jun,
  pages = {177},
  institution = {Centro de estudios y cohesion social},
  langid = {spanish},
  file = {C:\Users\casac\Zotero\storage\AVTWVIMI\2022 - Cuestionario_ELSOC_2022_M2.pdf}
}
